name: JourneyCheckpoint
description: Sparse positional snapshots from the Transition Journey. Created only when the operational position materially changes — not every conversation, not every event. Previous positions preserved to establish meaningful delta, confidence trend, and adaptation history. Not an activity log. Not an event feed. A record of where the individual was, at moments when where they are changed.

user_profile_id.description: Links to UserProfile (denormalised for RLS scoping)

partnership_state.description: Partnership state at time of checkpoint

transition_status_snapshot.description: Transition status at time of checkpoint — positional snapshot

confidence_band.description: Confidence band at time of checkpoint — behavioural, not numeric

active_commitments_snapshot.description: Commitments at time of checkpoint — positional snapshot, not a history

wellbeing_awareness_snapshot.description: Wellbeing awareness at time of checkpoint (if shared)

operational_readiness.description: Operational readiness at time of checkpoint

change_summary.description: Brief description of what materially changed to trigger the checkpoint
